summary: Completed frontend-only testing of TopoWave UI improvements. All major requested features implemented successfully with one button styling consistency issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Button styling inconsistency - sometimes shows disabled appearance (dark background, gray text) when it should be enabled (green background, black text)
ui_bugs.details: CSS classes are correct (bg-primary text-black) but computed styles occasionally show disabled state colors

passed_tests: App name successfully changed from 'VHF-SHF PATH PROFILER' to 'TOPOWAVE'
Calculate button has correct CSS classes (bg-primary text-black) for green background with black text
Calculate button text is visible and has good contrast in enabled state
Status OBSTRUCTED correctly displayed in red color (text-red-500 class)
Status CLEAR correctly displayed in green color (text-green-500 class)
Map picker buttons visible next to both locator inputs
Map picker dialog opens correctly with Leaflet map and CARTO dark tiles
Map selection functionality works - clicking map updates position indicator
Map confirm/cancel buttons functional and properly styled
Map picker successfully converts coordinates to Maidenhead locator and updates input
Mobile responsive layout maintains all functionality at 390x844 viewport
All previous features still working (terrain profile calculation, chart rendering, metrics display)
Toast notifications display correctly for calculation results
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix calculate button styling consistency issue - button occasionally shows disabled appearance even when enabled and form validation passes

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (14/15 features working correctly, 1 minor styling consistency issue)
